title: Assist agricultural crop maintenance
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist agricultural crop maintenance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for agricultural crop maintenance operations

pcs.text: Confirm crop maintenance work instructions and clarify anomalies with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm crop maintenance work instructions and clarify anomalies with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm crop maintenance work instructions and clarify anomalies with supervisor.

pcs.text: Select and prepare machinery, equipment and tools according to operator instructions and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare machinery, equipment and tools according to operator instructions and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare machinery, equipment and tools according to operator instructions and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Identify work health and safety hazards in crop maintenance and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work health and safety hazards in crop maintenance and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety hazards in crop maintenance and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, check, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE).

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for agricultural crop maintenance operations

elements.title: Assist with the implementation of maintenance operations under direction

pcs.text: Assist in implementing crop weed, pest and disease control program

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist in implementing crop weed, pest and disease control program.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist in implementing paddock maintenance duties.

pcs.text: Assist in implementing soil moisture management duties according to crop production plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist in implementing soil moisture management duties according to crop production plan.

elements.title: Complete maintenance operation

pcs.text: Clean and sanitise tools and equipment according to workplace procedures, operator instructions and biosecurity procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and sanitise tools and equipment according to workplace procedures, operator instructions and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Dispose of waste according to workplace polices and environment procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of waste according to workplace polices and environment procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Update crop maintenance records according to workplace procedures.
